metadata.title: Accurate activity commit counts and graph width

intent: Accurate activity commit counts and graph width
outcome: Repository activity now reports commit totals that match EVE snapshot history, and the compact graph no longer sits in a mostly empty full-width card.

fixed.description: Repository and activity commit counts include unique implementation snapshots as commits
Recent activity card sizes to the compact contribution grid instead of leaving a wide empty panel

verification.reference: go test ./...; npm test; npm run build; Playwright screenshot smoke check output/playwright/eve-activity-graph-fit-card.png
